title: Blame The Reward Of Princes.
content:
Among disasters that dissension brings,
    This not the least is, which belongs to kings:
    If wars go well, each for a part lays claim;
    If ill, then kings, not soldiers, bear the blame.
meaning:
"Blame The Reward Of Princes." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
